problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: The key to Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost? is Federated learning without data centralization — specifically Federated learning without — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
